title: BEZGAR HP161S Brushless RC Car - 4X4 RTR remote control cars for Adults High Speed Max 68kph Off-Road RC Vehicle Monster Truck With 3S Battery, Toy Gifts for Boy Age 8-12 and Adults
features: BEZGAR 1:16 Scale Brushless RC Car - Comes with bigger 4WD wheels, a better independent suspension system, a reinforced chassis, bright LED front light, and an upgraded powerful 2845 brushless motor built with cooling fins and a fan. All of these outstanding features power this hobby brushless rc truck to burst out at 68kph speed

3S Modular-Battery - The Brushless fast rc cars with 11.1V/25C high-capacity fire-retardant battery helps to boost high-speed and stable acceleration as well as extend your running time by 15 mins+. It's more durable and reliable than other battery. What's more, this off-road fast rc car has splash-proof electronic speed control(ESC) built with an aluminum heat sink that will provide a continuous operating current of 45A

Upgraded Collision-resistant Structures - The drivetrain system of this 4x4 fast rc truck is upgraded with adjustable metal tie rods, oil-filled metal shockers, metal drive shafts, and premium wear-resistant gears and differentials, which effectively shield against power loss and unexpected bumps, drops, and flips in performing stunts or hard bashing and ensures durable use

Dual throttle Speeds - This brushless RC truck is equipped with a 2.4GHz full-function radio system that allows multiple players to compete without interference for 250 feet of long-distance control. With a dual throttle speed option, RC hobbyists can choose the 100% normal speed, while the 70% slow speed is specifically designed for beginners and kids for easy start and steering

RTR Monster Truck RC - No matter whether you are a new hobbyist of RC cars or an advanced RC car enthusiast, these offroad 4x4 brushless rc cars for boys and adults are perfect for outdoor or indoor RC adventure. Matters need attention: Please install the wheelie bar to the tail of the brushless RC car for adults to avoid its wearing during hard bashing
